message:
feat(showcase): persist Layout Lab pane workspace to disk

Wire the showcase's Layout Lab pane workspace through the existing
pane_export/import_workspace_snapshot_json APIs so users can keep
their pane configuration across runs of the demo.

cli.rs:
- Add Opts::pane_workspace: Option<String>.
- Parse `--pane-workspace=PATH` long arg via the existing strip_prefix
  arm, ignoring blank values.
- Read FTUI_DEMO_PANE_WORKSPACE env var as a fallback. CLI args still
  win over env (covered by the new args_override_env_pane_workspace
  test).
- Document the flag and env var in HELP_TEXT.
- Update default_opts_zero_values, args_override_env_pane_workspace,
  and env_pane_workspace_sets_path tests; assert HELP_TEXT lists the
  new env var.

main.rs:
- After model construction, call
  model.enable_pane_workspace_persistence(path) when opts.pane_workspace
  is set, before tour kick-off so init() can prepopulate state from
  disk on the first tick.

app.rs (the actual persistence logic):
- AppModel gains pane_workspace_path: Option<PathBuf> and
  pane_workspace_next_save_tick: u64; both start unset / 0.
- enable_pane_workspace_persistence(path) just stores the path and
  resets the retry tick.
- load_pane_workspace_from_disk(): on init(), read the file, hand the
  JSON to layout_lab.pane_import_workspace_snapshot_json. NotFound is
  silent (first-run case); other errors log a "load_error" event to
  the action timeline. Successful load logs "load_ok" with the
  generation pulled from layout_lab.pane_workspace_generation().
- save_pane_workspace_to_disk(reason, force): runs after every update()
  with force=false (autosave) and from on_shutdown() with force=true.
  Skips when path unset, when not yet at the retry tick, or when
  layout_lab reports the workspace clean (unless forced). Captures
  the workspace generation, exports JSON, writes via the new
  write_pane_workspace_snapshot helper, then asks layout_lab to ack
  the save with pane_mark_workspace_saved(generation).
  - Export errors -> "save_export_error" + retry-tick backoff.
  - Write errors -> "save_write_error" + retry-tick backoff.
  - Ack-stale (a newer generation arrived between snapshot and ack) ->
    "save_ack_stale" + retry-tick backoff.
  - Success -> "save_ok" + clear retry tick.
- write_pane_workspace_snapshot(): create parent dir if needed, write
  to a sibling .tmp file, then atomically rename onto the target path
  so a partial write is never observed.
- record_pane_workspace_persistence(action, path, generation, detail)
  feeds every save/load outcome into the action timeline as a
  "Pane workspace persistence" command event so the timeline screen
  shows the lifecycle.
- PANE_WORKSPACE_SAVE_RETRY_TICKS = 20: throttle backoff after a soft
  failure so we don't busy-retry on every update().
- on_shutdown() forces a final flush so a clean exit always commits
  pending pane changes.

Imports in app.rs: add `fs` and `PathBuf` to the std imports already
in use.

This builds on the workspace-persistence lifecycle hooks landed in
c38349a9 and the save acknowledgement fix in 431a15d1; the showcase
binary now exercises that whole surface end-to-end.
